Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current R1 Concepts brake parts catalog, promotions, and product details to inform email content.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries or contacts.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 website.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts, handling inquiries such as product fitment, order status, and general support.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Performs keyword-based web searches to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to target niches.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and consolidates discovered creator data, ranking and categorizing creators by relevance, reach, and niche fit.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes online catalogs from Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to compile a make/model/year reference sheet for two-piece rotors.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns for specific flagged phrases or terms.

Meta Investigation.action: Matches ad copy against the specified search phrases, identifies exact fields and locations where each match was found, and compiles a flagged list.
